data.title: Microservices
data.description: YouTube utilizes a microservices architecture, allowing independent deployment and scaling of individual components.
data.technical_spec: Deployed across distributed servers using container orchestration, likely Kubernetes.

data.title: CDN Integration
data.description: Content Delivery Network (CDN) integration ensures fast and reliable access to video content globally.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Google's extensive global CDN network.

data.title: Data Storage Solutions
data.description: Robust data storage systems for managing vast video content and user data.
data.technical_spec: Combination of Bigtable for structured data and Colossus (Google's file system) for unstructured.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Sophisticated load balancing to manage millions of concurrent connections.

data.title: API Ecosystem
data.description: Extensive API ecosystem allows external interactions with YouTube services.
data.technical_spec: RESTful architecture, supporting OAuth2 for authentication.
